activities_projects.title: Research Project on Global Resource Inequality
activities_projects.objective: Analyze the unequal distribution of resources across different countries
steps: Students select two countries with different levels of resource availability
Research the natural resources present in each country
Compare how resource availability affects development
Prepare a detailed research report
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how resource distribution influences economic development
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of research and comparative analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Case Study on Resource Depletion
activities_projects.objective: Examine real-world examples of resource depletion
steps: Select a case such as deforestation or water scarcity
Study the causes of resource depletion
Identify environmental and social impacts
Suggest sustainable management strategies
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze environmental challenges related to resource overuse
activities_projects.evaluation: Critical thinking and quality of case study (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Resource Management Policy Proposal
activities_projects.objective: Develop strategies for sustainable resource management
steps: Form groups and select a natural resource such as water, forests, or minerals
Identify problems related to its misuse
Design a policy proposal for sustainable management
Present the proposal to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn policy-making approaches for resource conservation
activities_projects.evaluation: Innovation and practicality of the proposal (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Data Analysis of Resource Consumption
activities_projects.objective: Interpret data related to resource use
steps: Collect data about global energy or water consumption
Create graphs representing consumption patterns
Interpret trends shown in the data
Discuss reasons for variations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop data interpretation and analytical skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of graphs and interpretation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Debate on Economic Development vs Resource Conservation
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate conflicting priorities between development and conservation
steps: Divide students into two groups
One group supports rapid industrial development
The other group argues for strict resource conservation
Conduct a structured debate with evidence
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students critically evaluate the balance between development and sustainability
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of arguments and evidence used (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: GIS-Based Resource Mapping (Conceptual)
activities_projects.objective: Understand modern techniques used for resource mapping
steps: Study examples of digital resource mapping
Select a region and identify available resources
Create a conceptual resource map
Explain how technology helps manage resources
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand advanced methods used in geographical analysis
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and clarity of mapping (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Study of Renewable Energy Sources
steps: Research solar, wind, hydro, and geothermal energy
Compare advantages and disadvantages
Analyze their feasibility in India
Present findings using charts
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the role of renewable energy in sustainable development
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of comparison and presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Impact Assessment of Resource Extraction
activities_projects.objective: Assess environmental and social impacts of mining and resource extraction
steps: Study mining activities in a specific region
Identify environmental consequences
Analyze social impacts on local communities
Prepare an impact assessment report
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students evaluate the consequences of resource extraction
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of impact assessment and conclusions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Sustainable Development Action Plan
activities_projects.objective: Design practical solutions for sustainable resource use
steps: Identify resource-related problems in the local area
Brainstorm possible solutions
Develop an action plan for conservation
Present the plan to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students apply sustainability principles to real-life situations
activities_projects.evaluation: Feasibility and creativity of the action plan (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Critical Essay on Resource Sustainability
activities_projects.objective: Develop critical thinking about long-term resource management
steps: Research global challenges related to resource sustainability
Analyze different viewpoints on resource use
Write an analytical essay
Present key ideas in class discussion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop advanced reasoning and writing skills related to environmental sustainability
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of argument and clarity of essay (10 marks)
